titleStmt.title: SII 36.33: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 33. (A.R. No. 33 of 1910.) IRUMBUDALAI, PAPANASAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On a tier running round the base of the central shrine in the Trilōkanāthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Stones in disorder and some stones are built upside down. The village assembly (peruṅkuṟi-sabhā) of Maṉukulach-chaturvēdi-maṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Āvūr-kūṟṟam, a subdivision of Nittavinōda-vaḷanāḍu, assigned paddy for meeting expenses of sacred food offerings and for maintaining lamps in the shrines of Tiruvirumbūdaluḍaiya Mahādēva, Kūttapperumāḷ, Amarabhujaṅgadēva, and Gaṇapathi in the local temple. Food offerings to deities include rice mixed with vegetables, ghee, and curds.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyum tanakke Urimai pūṇṭamai ma c cālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkai ñāṭum kaṅka pāṭiyum nuḷampa pāṭiyum taṭi malaināṭum kollamu mum Eṇṭicai pukaḻ tara Īḻa maṇṭalamum Ilaṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum tiṇ ṇṭāṟ koṇṭat to kaiviḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait te ḷ śrī ko Irājarājakesarivanmarāna śrī Irājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 3 Āvatu nittavinota vaḷanāṭṭu Āvūrk kūṟṟattu brahmadeyam śrī maṉukulac
caturvvetimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom tiruvirumpūtaluṭaiya mahādevar tiruvuṇṇāḻikaip puṟam paṅku nālum śrīkayilāsattu mahādevar tiruvuṇ ṇāḻikaip puṟam paṅku nālum Āṇṭu Āṭṭaippaṭi nellu toḷḷāyirattilum nāṅkaḷ ceyta nivan=tamāvatu tiruvirumpūtalluṭaiya mahādevarkku tiruvamutū mūṉṟu san=tikkum Arici nellu 3 mūn_ṛumākkum neyyamutu mūṉṟu santi porikaṟiyamutukkumāka nicatam ney Uḻakkukku nellu mūṉṟumā yum tayiramutu mūṉṟu san=tikkummāka nicatam Uraikku nellu 1 Uriyum Aṭaikkāyamutukku nicatam nellu
santiviḷakku potu Eḻāka mūṉṟu san=tikkum viḷakku Irupattoṉṟukkum kūttap perumāḷukku[sa]ntikku poti 6 ku Āṟukkum Amarabhujaṅka devarkku santi viḷakku potu Oṉṟāka mūṉṟukkum gaṇapatiyāṟku Irā ruviḷakkumāka santi viḷakku nicatam nellutūṇiyum nontāviḷakku Oṉṟukku Eṇṇai Uḻakkukku nellu mūṉṟumā yum śrīpalikkum kkumpiṭi viḷak � ppaṭi Uriyāka Orāṭṭai nāḷaikku nellu 3 100 m kūttap perumāḷukku tiruvamutukku potu Arici 3 yāka mūṉṟu san=tikkum Arici-mūṉṟumā 3kku nellu 3 10 3 3 yum kaṟiyamutukku muṉṟu san=tikku nellu (stops here)
Digital edition of SII 36.33 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
